title: halimium umbellatum var. vulgare
intro: Halimium umbellatum var. vulgare, also known as Rock Rose or Halimiun, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cistaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat a range of ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Halimium umbellatum var. vulgare include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
